name: Provision of Credit to Private sector
description_short: Statistics on credit card transactions at point-of-sale terminals across the EU, with detailed breakdowns by card function, merchant category, authentication method, and fraud type.
use_cases: What share of card transactions use contactless payment?
How does card fraud vary by transaction channel?
What is the growth in e-commerce card payments?
How has strong customer authentication (SCA) affected card acceptance rates?
